title: RippleGuard Event Envelope
description: Common immutable envelope for RippleGuard events. eventId supports idempotency, correlationId joins one loan application flow, and causationId identifies the immediately preceding event; root events use null.

eventId.description: Immutable event identifier used for duplicate detection.

eventType.description: Versioned event name, independent from schemaVersion.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of this event schema.

applicationId.description: Loan Application identifier when the event belongs to an application. Null is allowed for events created before an application exists; legacy v1 payloads may omit it.

evaluationRunId.description: Evaluation Run identifier when the event is run-scoped. Null is allowed for pre-evaluation events; legacy v1 payloads may omit it.

causationId.description: Previous event ID, or null only for a root event.
